items.title: Kubernetes v1.36 Sneak Peek
items.summary:
<p>Kubernetes v1.36 is coming at the end of April 2026. This release will include removals and deprecations, and it is packed with an impressive number of
enhancements. Here are some of the features we are most excited about in this cycle!</p>

items.reason: Major upcoming Kubernetes version with many new features; highly relevant for a Wiki covering container orchestration.

items.title: Reclaim Developer Hours through Smarter Vulnerability Prioritization with Docker and Mend.io
items.summary: We recently announced the integration between Mend.io and Docker Hardened Images (DHI) provides a seamless framework for managing container security. By automatically distinguishing between base image vulnerabilities and application-layer risks, it uses VEX statements to differentiate between exploi
items.reason: Introduces a new security workflow (Mend.io + Docker Hardened Images) that is important for container security documentation.

items.title: Defending Your Software Supply Chain: What Every Engineering Team Should Do Now
items.summary: The software supply chain is under sustained attack. Not from a single threat actor or a single incident, but from an ecosystem-wide campaign that has been escalating for months and shows no signs of slowing down. This week, axios, the HTTP client library downloaded 83 million times per week and pre
items.reason: Discusses software‑supply‑chain threats and mitigation steps; core topic for a security‑focused Wiki.

items.reason: AI model distribution via Docker Hub is a new use‑case for OCI artifacts, relevant for DevOps and AI‑ops sections.

items.summary: Docker Desktop is one of the most widely used developer tools in the world, yet for millions of enterprise developers, running it simply hasn’t been an option. items.reason: Docker Offload GA expands Docker Desktop usage scenarios; worth documenting for enterprise developer tooling.

items.title: docker/compose v5.1.2
items.summary:
## What's Changed
### 🐛 Fixes
* Fix TTY timer rendering when duration length changes by @MaybeSam05 in https://github.com/docker/compose/pull/13634
* Fix up attach filtering by @false200 in https://github.com/docker/compose/pull/13664
* Preserve ssh:// URL scheme when resolving Dockerfile path
items.reason: Docker Compose 5.1.2 release includes bug fixes; relevant for tooling changelog documentation.

items.title: oven-sh/bun bun-v1.3.12
items.summary:
To install Bun v1.3.12
```bash
curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash
# or you can use npm
# npm install -g bun
```

Windows:
```bash
powershell -c "irm bun.sh/install.ps1|iex"
```

To upgrade to Bun v1.3.12:
```bash
bun upgrade
```

### [Read Bun v1.3.12's release notes on Bun's
items.reason: Bun v1.3.12 release adds new features/bug fixes; pertinent for JavaScript runtime comparison pages.
